testcase.name: orderPlacement

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (743, 607). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '26' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [bbc542619db1d177331ceec61a93ae99, clickElement {id=f.1B4139546EC29AA7718824160B00F8AA.d.81A224D89C7E0C8B66DBB6EADF422B93.e.65}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\WINDOWS\SystemTemp\scope...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52997}, goog:processID: 7000, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52997/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[[[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (bbc542619db1d177331ceec61a93ae99)] -> xpath: //section[@id='products']//div[@class='row']/div]] -> xpath: .//button[normalize-space()='Add To Cart']] Session ID: bbc542619db1d177331ceec61a93ae99
